svg.title: pr-human-guide skill flow
svg.desc: A six-step pipeline: parse arguments, fetch PR metadata and diff, classify changes against six review categories, generate a markdown guide, replace or append the bounded block in the PR description, and report the result.

g.text: gh pr view — or auto-detect from branch
3. Classify each file against six categories
flag only where human judgment materially affects review
build internal table: file • lines • category • reason
checkbox per item, SHA-256 diff anchors,
